user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

retrieved_documents.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario
Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 6 > Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Day 5 > Email Catch-up Block

fields.name: Coffee break near AGO (Café at/near the gallery)
fields.description: Quick coffee and light pastries at a convenient café near the Art Gallery of Ontario — a short walk from the gallery entrance and perfect to recharge after the workshop.

output.reasoning: Workshop ends at 11:00 AM and the AGO is at noon; inserting a 11:15–11:45 AM coffee break before the AGO places a short rest between activities and is within walking distance of the gallery. Position 0 places it immediately before the Art Gallery of Ontario entry.
